Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model

package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
  • Class
    Description
    Card
    The abstract Card class represents a card of the game.
    ChatMessage
    The ChatMessage class represents a message.
    Content
    This enum class represents every resource and object of the game.
    ContentCounter
    This class represents a counter to keep track of a player's number of resources and objects.
    Coordinate
    This class represents a point in two-dimensional space.
    Deck
    Represents a deck of cards used in a game.
    Face
    The abstract Face class represents a face of a card.
    Game
    Class Game Description: This class manages the state and behavior of the game.
    GameManager
    Class GameManager Description: This class manages the lifecycle of games.
    GameState
    This enum class represents all the possible state of a game.
    GoldCard
    The GoldCard class represents a gold card of the game.
    GoldFront
    The GoldFront class represents the front face of a GoldCard.
    NormalBack
    The NormalBack class represents the back face of a ResourceCard or GoldCard.
    NormalCard
    The NormalCard class is an abstract class representing a playable card with a NormalBack back face.
    NormalFace
    The NormalFace class represents the front face of a ResourceCard or the back face of a StarterCard.
    NotStructuredObjectiveCard
    Class NotStructuredObjectiveCard Description: This class represents an objective card that requires a non-structured collection of objects to be completed.
    ObjectiveCard
    Class ObjectiveCard Description: This abstract class represents an objective card in the game.
    PlayableCard
    the PlayableCard is an abstract class representing all the cards that can be played on the playground, i.e.
    Player
    Class Player Description: This class represents a player in the game.
    PlayerColor
    The PlayerColor enum represents the different colors that a player can choose in the game.
    PlayerGround
    The PlayerGround class represents the play area of a player in the game.
    ResourceCard
    The ResourceCard class represents a resource card of the game.
    StarterCard
    The StarterCard class represents a starter card of the game.
    StarterFront
    The StarterFront class represents the front face of a StarterCard This class is a subclass of Face and it adds the central Content list.
    Structure
    Enum Structure Description: This enum represents different possible structures required by some objective cards, the structured ones.
    StructuredObjectiveCard
    Class StructuredObjectiveCard Description: This class represents an objective card that requires a specific structure to be completed.
